lse}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566686128999973694","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过的最好的小马同人文了，剧情安排的很合理。有自己的原创剧情。不像其他的就知道在原有的剧情上改一改，完全没有任何延伸的地方，都是一些看过的剧情做些改动无聊的很。番外恋爱剧情很吸引人，而且作为番外既没有影响到主线剧情，又填补了没有恋爱剧情的短板。很完美。ദ്ദി˶•̀֊•́)✧[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761760669,"group_id":"7403717290417474622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便怎样，开心就好。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx11sOlfoxzJwsYy6jkoTQL5bvl5MaIdu8SYNFwG74l/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/39a00c52e4c74928a85eeb77be2d1ccc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776709786\u0026x-signature=t68blwB8OrPU%2FwTJNm18b181ark%3D","user_id":"2559316076004908","user_name":"ki墨迹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2559316076004908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info":{"abstract":"在坎特洛特高中，一个黑发的少年正斜靠在学校标志性的骏马雕像下。他双目紧闭，好像睡着了。过了一会，他眼皮动了动......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"dwdd","author_id":"","book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_name":"坎特洛特高中的倒霉侦探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status" se}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471903252122403646","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常棒，我看到小马宝莉里面最棒的一本，有自己的故事，有剧情融合的也很好，我看同人是不喜欢作者原创剧情的大部分不是煽情就是夹在里面很违和，这本融入得就非常好，阅读极度舒适，不违和，性格塑造的也很好，一个别扭的侦探，我是一口气看完的，没有一点厌倦的感觉，其中加入了一点点福尔摩斯的元素，唯一的就是我不喜欢看悲伤的部分，关于身世那我不是很喜欢，不过也说明了为什么主角会是这么一个性格，当然是个人喜好的原因，不印象整本书的观感，十分推荐！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739693417,"group_id":"7403717290417474622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"非著名同人爱好者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0glDS49AB739/EeANXDekj1hvznhqP04EWvra6FZsDO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/88d8786720be43f19347568578a585fe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706529\u0026x-signature=MDgzL%2FI8b37kDO3ZQ%2BYJoxXYMmk%3D","user_id":"1706915948659656","user_name":"爱吃香菇炖鸡腿的蛮熙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1706915948659656","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info":{"abstract":"在坎特洛特高中，一个黑发的少年正斜靠在学校标志性的骏马雕像下。他双目紧闭，好像睡着了。过了一会，他眼皮动了动......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"dwdd","author_id":"","book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_name":"坎特洛特高中的倒霉侦探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3 _official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info":{"abstract":"在坎特洛特高中，一个黑发的少年正斜靠在学校标志性的骏马雕像下。他双目紧闭，好像睡着了。过了一会，他眼皮动了动......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"dwdd","author_id":"","book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_name":"坎特洛特高中的倒霉侦探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403717409325974078","read_count":"23490","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"801444"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"214","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779363569\u0026x-signature=T3bJy51tbpkkASw%2F1wpp5GeO0NI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2630479010070743","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21509,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10443},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7467829053740516121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容上:本书的文风和逻辑等都很切合原动画那种细腻和温暖的感觉，原创的内容一点都不突兀，甚至可以说很多时候给人物的塑造增添了精彩，目前主角与出现的角色之间都保持着一股微妙的关系（换句话说就是几乎和谁都能磕上两下[捂脸]），不清楚后续会怎样去发展感情线，感觉到后面可能不会很好写，还是希望能有一个完美的结局[送心]（另外:塞拉斯蒂亚的牢卡亲制蛋糕什么时候能吃上哇[送心]真的很喜欢亲情线∩V∩）\n结构上:构思和思路等很巧妙，会让读者在阅读时代入其中参与对事件的思考但不会太烧脑，前面埋下的行为伏笔也在牢卡的过去揭开的时候解释清楚了，前与后的剧情一定程度上环环相扣\n人物上:主角性格鲜明，每个角色都各自有着自己的闪光点，并很好表现了出来（不脱离动画角色本身的性格，不为了剧情而牺牲角色特性），虽然个人感觉牢卡心态改变那段篇幅给的略有些长，但是很符合一个人复杂的心理与自我的改变\n总结:很好看的一部作品，选题新颖，有思想有内容，喜欢这种题材的话很推荐[赞]\n小“缺陷”:大大能不能扩一下群啊啊啊[伤心]蹲了好几天都没加进去[石化]\n【以上仅个人见解，不喜勿喷，本人家庭美满家人健在无隐在疾病等，祝大家都有美好的一天】"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738743156,"group_id":"7403717290417474622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"思考仅持续三秒，说话从不过大脑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N34B1bhEqA024LiNU4Gn1kzgnsHeyw1uyocLZpxcLqAg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/045ebccf93dc4780bea2ce8081adcd63~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776707568\u0026x-signature=nrZekBXMWFsB%2FWo2EWhpd9AXb4c%3D","user_id":"1552969975472440","user_name":"卡门不会卡门里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1552969975472440","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"boo el":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info":{"abstract":"在坎特洛特高中，一个黑发的少年正斜靠在学校标志性的骏马雕像下。他双目紧闭，好像睡着了。过了一会，他眼皮动了动......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"dwdd","author_id":"","book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_name":"坎特洛特高中的倒霉侦探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403717409325974078","read_count":"23490","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"801444"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"214","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779363569\u0026x-signature=T3bJy51tbpkkASw%2F1wpp5GeO0NI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2630479010070743","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4520,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":33768},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7453554579927401278","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，喜欢看，作者大大请快更新啊啊啊啊[抓狂][抓狂]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735429830,"group_id":"7403717290417474622","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105647309608"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"105"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12434,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7448305800678359870","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看的小马文。\n1:各个角色的性格刻画与原著吻合，文笔也不错，从文字里能够清楚的想象出画面感觉就是在看动画，M6与其他角色（海妖三姐妹、公主姐妹）的描述也是十分生动形象。\n2:主角的设定也很新颖且奇特，偶尔的槽点和玩梗也恰到好处，从作者对人物的安排与感情线可以看出不会是无脑后宫流（女主莫名其妙自我感动将自己送出，男主自然接受），主角对来自其他角色的好感与情意持理性态度，体现了男主感情细腻不随便。\n3:虽然没看过小马国女孩但不影响对文章的阅读，剧情也是稳定没有毒点，即使是没有看过原著动画的书友也可以放心食用。\n4:根据作者在文章里埋下的伏笔能看出结局可能会出现几条不同的线路，举例：男主恢复记忆回归现实线、恢复记忆选择留下线、与世界规则或者类似幕后大Boss决战线、世界重置线。（个人猜测）但还是希望作者大大能够给出个好结局。\n总而言之是一本很好很好看的小马文，作者大大也十分高产，希望能够稳定按照大纲写到完结，不要草草结尾（求求了，好不容易看到这么对胃口的书），也希望文章内容基本以日常为主，战斗什么的适当（应该不会有战斗吧？），同时期待作者有时间精力可以写写小马利亚世界，多给暮光闪闪和大师姐一些出场机会，加油作者大大，永远支持你！[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734205087,"group_id":"7403717290417474622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5L/WD/g/l4I1irTkNiUFYM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dc0fbb3915094c93817f3ae93a76a5c3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776707760\u0026x-signature=nOiviuT326KqlmfMEqVBrwvpREg%3D","user_id":"105647309608","user_name":"神威也难藏遗憾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105647309608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_info":{"abstract":"在坎特洛特高中，一个黑发的少年正斜靠在学校标志性的骏马雕像下。他双目紧闭，好像睡着了。过了一会，他眼皮动了动......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"dwdd","author_id":"","book_id":"7403717290417474622","book_name":"坎特洛特高中的倒霉侦探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403717409325974078","read_count":"23490","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"801444"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"214","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o75232bc57bc794400c84c6c1dfa5891a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779363569\u0026x-signature=T3bJy51tbpkkASw%2F1wpp5GeO0NI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2630479010070743","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"90"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10804,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17477},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1742547131,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456075960921539352","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"如果不出意外，这本将会是目前而言最好看的小马国女孩的同人文了。\n在还原原著的同时，又可以将主角凸显出来，做到不挤压其他角色的戏份，就这点而言已经超过绝大多数的同人文了。\n还有就是主角，其实于我而言，一本同人文，想要做到优秀需要有两点：\n一、还原原著的角色，这点在小马国女孩这种每个角色都性格分明的动画里，其实是最容易做到的\n二、把自己原创的部分写好，这点才是最能看出作者写作功底的部分，因此是为最难，目前来说，我看过的同人文里只有五本能做到，而这本就是其中之一。\n最后，作者加油👍\n期待你能写出更多豪堪德[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestam
